top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ss_channel,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_profit
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ss_item_sk,
        ss_store_sk,
        ss_net_profit,
        'store' AS ss_channel
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d_date_sk 
        FROM date_dim 
        WHERE d_year = 1999
    )
) ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, ss_channel
ORDER BY total_profit DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ss_channel,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_profit
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ss_item_sk,
        ss_store_sk,
        ss_net_profit,

    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk IN (

        WHERE d_year = 1999
    )
) ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, ss_channel
ORDER BY total_profit DESC
LIMIT 100

WITH sales_1999 AS (
    SELECT 
        ss_item_sk,
        ss_net_profit,
        'store' AS ss_channel
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d_date_sk 
        FROM date_dim 
        WHERE d_year = 1999
    )
)
SELECT 
    i.i_item_id,
    ss.ss_channel,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_profit
FROM sales_1999 ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_item_id, ss.ss_channel
ORDER BY total_profit DESC
LIMIT 100

final.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ss_channel,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_profit
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ss_item_sk,
        ss_store_sk,
        ss_net_profit,
        'store' AS ss_channel
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d_date_sk 
        FROM date_dim 
        WHERE d_year = 1999
    )
) ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, ss_channel
ORDER BY total_profit DESC
LIMIT 100
